arts.ttl: Nico Williams remains coy on future amid Barcelona, Arsenal and Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Nico Williams has insisted he's 'happy' at Atletico Club after snubbing interest from Barcelona, Chelsea and Arsenal during the summer transfer window. “I’m happy in Bilbao, I’ve decided to stay here," said Williams.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams set to miss out on Athletic Club squad to travel to Girona
arts.sum: Ernesto Valverde announced today his matchday squad that is set to travel to Girona for Sunday afternoon’s clash at Montilivi. The biggest news in the announcement is the absence of…

arts.ttl: Key Girona star facing a month on the sidelines with injury
arts.sum: Girona faced Feyenoord in their first-ever Champions League home tie on Wednesday evening. Having lost 3-2, things are now looking even worse with one of their key stars set to…
